Chronology of every recorded fact about [[vital aura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Vital aura is absorbed by animals and plants to facilitate advancement.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Copper stage allows the ability to cycle vital aura from heaven and earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Vital aura responds to sword resonance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Sacred beasts refine vital aura into madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Vital aura is like the madra of the natural world and returns to its source.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — A rainbow of vital aura rises over the pyramid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The mining mechanism draws in vital aura from the region.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Vital aura can be sensed by Copper senses.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The cloudship must fly lower when the vital aura runs low.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Vital aura is the power of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Vital aura can generate sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Soulfire is woven from condensed vital aura.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Vital aura makes Cradle larger than average for an inhabited planet and affects how humanity spreads.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Vital aura can still like a held breath.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan watches the vital aura in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Vital aura is described as having no beginning and no end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has a connection to the vital aura.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lands with strong vital aura can experience aura-storms.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Min Shuei can freeze vital aura with her will.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Fury's technique involves something deeper than vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The vital aura was muted and washed out near the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Skepticism could be seen in the vital aura.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Tension in the air can be sensed as a vibration in the vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Vital aura is a chaotic power that spins like a churning sea.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Vital aura can be focused over hundreds of miles.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen reaches out to a buzzing vital aura during his transformation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian can Rule the vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Cycling vital aura is more difficult than normal meditation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon felt the vital aura in Cradle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
